description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a flat roof and a small dome on one corner, reminiscent of Mediterranean or Spanish Colonial architecture. The upper floor is partially covered by a pergola with green vines, providing a shaded outdoor terrace. The main entrance is accessible via a staircase leading up from a ground-level patio, which is bordered by low walls and greenery. A small, circular pool or fountain is situated in the front yard, adding to the residential charm. The building is finished in a light peach color with white and green accents, and the windows and doors are simple, rectangular, and sparsely distributed. The overall design is compact, with a mix of open and enclosed spaces, and a visible porch area supported by columns.
description: A two-story, flat-roofed bungalow with a dome, pergola-covered terrace, and a small circular pool in front. The structure features Mediterranean-inspired details, light peach walls, and green accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase, main entrance, pergola terrace, and circular pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched doorway, porch with columns, and the dome above the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, plain wall, the dome, and the full extent of the pergola on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staircase, greenery along the base, and the pool to the right.
